title: WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON ASHLAND WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Gynecological care. Services include pap tests, menopause counseling and therapy, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, fertility evaluation and treatment and pregnancy testing. Transgender hormone therapy, STD counseling and treatment, contraceptives and genetic counseling services offered. Does not offer obstetric services. 595 N Main Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-8363 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances. Payment plans available. Care Credit accepted. Billing department can provide quote prior to appointment. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, and Josephine Counties Services: Birth Control Counseling Contraception Genetic Counseling Infertility Services Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization * Women Transgender Hormone Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON ASHLAND
